name: The KeyW Holding Corporation
description: The KeyW Holding Corporation, through its subsidiaries, provided mission-critical cybersecurity, cyber superiority, and geospatial intelligence solutions primarily to government, defense, and intelligence customers in the United States. The company specialized in engineering and technology solutions that supported the collection, processing, analysis, and dissemination of information across the intelligence, cyber, and counterterrorism communities. KeyW was acquired by Jacobs Engineering Group in 2019 and is no longer an independent publicly traded entity.
